name: ModelHistory
summary: The ModelHistory class provides history information about the objects of the model that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetCurrentModificationStamp
methods.summary: Gets the current modification stamp from the model.

methods.name: GetDeletedObjects
methods.summary: Gets a list of the objects that have been deleted after the modification stamp.

methods.name: GetDeletedObjectsWithType
methods.summary: Gets based on type a list of the objects that have been deleted after the modification stamp.

methods.name: GetLocalChanges
methods.summary: Get changes which are not written out.

methods.name: GetModifications(String, ModificationStamp)
methods.summary: Lookup modifications since previous call of TakeModifications() without resetting the modstamp

methods.name: GetModifications(String, IEnumerable.ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum., ModificationStamp)
methods.summary: Lookup modifications since previous call of TakeModifications() without resetting the modstamp, with object type filtering

methods.name: GetModifiedObjects
methods.summary: Gets a list of the objects that have been added or modified after the modification stamp.

methods.name: GetModifiedObjectsWithType
methods.summary: Gets based on type a list of the objects that have been added or modified after the modification stamp.

methods.name: GetNotSharedObjects
methods.summary: Get object which are was created or modified since last ModelSharing WriteOut.

methods.name: TakeModifications(String, IEnumerable.ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum., ModificationStamp)
methods.summary: Take modifications since previous call, with object type filtering.

methods.name: UpdateModificationStampToLatest
methods.summary: Updates the modification stamp to latest.
